name: Printfleet.app
description: Personal product project started in 01/2026 to build a management suite for 3D print farms. Built with TypeScript, Next.js, Prisma, WebSockets, and Server-Sent Events to create responsive, real-time operational interfaces connected to Bambu Lab and Klipper-based environments.

name: Car Mechanic Simulator 2021 save game editor
description: A save-file editor for Car Mechanic Simulator 2021 that runs entirely in your browser — no installation, no Python, no server.

name: Kaplan B2B Shopping Cart
description: Built React + TypeScript frontend features for a B2B shopping cart, integrated product workflows with backend services through GraphQL, and supported migration from a legacy PHP + Flex application to a modern frontend architecture.

name: ProductPlan Parking Lot
description: Contributed to the Parking Lot feature for a product roadmap platform, working with React, Redux, and Redux Saga while helping shape reusable frontend patterns and a better first-time user experience.

name: Figuritas Repetidas
description: Small side project created with close friends before the 2024 Panini World Cup album cycle. Built a simple React frontend with a Laravel backend to manage repeated stickers and support a clean, easy-to-use interface for collectors.

name: Elecciones Panamá
description: Built with three collaborators between 03/2024 and 04/2024. Created an application for exploring long-form candidate government plans through a React frontend integrated with Node.js backend services and an in-house RAG solution powered by PostgreSQL and pgvector.

name: Sun Life Login Team
description: Security-sensitive authentication work across legacy and modern stacks, improving login reliability and preserving user experience while addressing vulnerabilities and integration issues.

name: Custom CRM at Rootstack
description: Helped implement a CRM frontend with AngularJS connected to a Symfony REST API, reinforcing API-driven development and collaboration across frontend and backend concerns.

name: Copa Origins & Destinations Calendar
description: Implemented customer-facing booking functionality for Origins & Destinations and the departure date calendar during a major airline eCommerce redesign, supporting usability and conversion-oriented web flows.

name: realtravelfeedback.com
description: Supported the creation of a travel feedback platform and maintenance of related web properties for Costa Rica Expeditions, contributing to user-facing web experiences in a travel domain.
